channel.title: Chris Eaton
channel.description: Thoughts on AI, building software, and the things in between.

item.title: The Future of AI Assistants
item.description: How AI agents are evolving beyond chat interfaces into genuinely capable collaborators — and what that means for how we work.

item.title: Building in Public
item.description: Why I believe in sharing progress openly, learning from the community, and the unexpected benefits of working with the garage door up.

item.title: Lessons from Shipping Fast
item.description: What I've learned about velocity, quality, and the art of knowing when something is good enough to share with the world.
